originalTitle: Barclays resets S&P 500 price target with a key warning
summary: The S&P 500 has been running ahead of Wall Street's targets all year. Banks that set their year-end forecasts in December have been revising them upward, sometimes more than once. Barclays joined the list again on June 23. Venu Krishna, the firm's head of U.S. equity strategy, raised the ...

chineseTitle: 巴克莱重置标普 500 指数价格目标并发出重要警告
chineseSummary: 标准普尔 500 指数全年都领先于华尔街的目标。 12月份设定年终预测的银行一直在上调，有时甚至不止一次。巴克莱银行 (Barclays) 于 6 月 23 日再次上榜。该公司美国股票策略主管维努·克里希纳 (Venu Krishna) 上调了...

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
